alt: Wandering albatross standing on a coastal ridge, displaying its immense physical size
caption: With a wingspan that can reach up to 3.5 meters (11.5 feet), they can lock their wing joints to soar for thousands of kilometers without flapping.
acquisitionNotes: Striking profile demonstrating massive standing size and robust body structure. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/92/Kerguelen_-_Diomedea_exulans.jpg
attributionText: Photo by Dimitri Damasceno from Bruxelles, Belgium via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.0
